---
title: "Bokeh Smoke Test"
format: html
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This page is a minimal compatibility check to confirm that Bokeh renders correctly inside Quarto.

```{python}
from bokeh.plotting import figure, show

x = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
y = [3, 7, 5, 9, 6]

p = figure(
    title="Bokeh works in Quarto",
    x_axis_label="Song index (dummy)",
    y_axis_label="Popularity (dummy)",
    width=650,
    height=350,
    tools="pan,wheel_zoom,box_zoom,reset,save",
)

p.circle(x, y, size=12, color="#1DB954", alpha=0.8)
p.line(x, y, line_width=2, color="#191414", alpha=0.6)

show(p)
```

If you can see and interact with the chart above after rendering, Bokeh integration is working.
